scripts.build: npm run build:clean && npm run build:copy && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:html
scripts.build:clean: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/css dist/js dist/assets/img
scripts.build:css: npx clean-css-cli -o dist/css/style.css css/style.css && npx clean-css-cli -o dist/css/terminal.css css/terminal.css
scripts.build:js: npx terser js/main.js -o dist/js/main.js -c -m && npx terser js/terminal.js -o dist/js/terminal.js -c -m && npx terser js/translations.js -o dist/js/translations.js -c -m
scripts.build:html: npx html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true --minify-js true -o dist/index.html index.html && npx html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-css true -o dist/privacy-policy.html privacy-policy.html
